findings.detail: Only one template chip, so there wasn’t much real choice in the editor.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a few more template options so the user can compare styles and feel in control.

findings.detail: The template switch area felt a bit bare because there was only a single option to compare against.
findings.proposed_solution: Add clearer labels or previews for the palette choices so the differences are easy to understand at a glance.

findings.detail: Palette choices were present, but the overall design-control area still felt limited for a business owner trying to shape a brand.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the first-time editor flow feel more guided, with a simple step-by-step path for branding and page setup.

findings.detail: The editor is functional, but the experience feels more like a simple setup screen than a full website-design workspace.
findings.proposed_solution: Surface a stronger visual summary of what can be edited so the workspace feels more complete and less sparse.

warnings.detail: Only one template chip, so there wasn’t much real choice in the editor.
The template switch area felt a bit bare because there was only a single option to compare against.
Palette choices were present, but the overall design-control area still felt limited for a business owner trying to shape a brand.
The editor is functional, but the experience feels more like a simple setup screen than a full website-design workspace.
